Collection: Online Professional Development Courses for K-12 Teachers Certificate Included Accepted by most districts 100% Online Self-paced · 180 days to complete University Credits Optional add-on at checkout CE Credits Online offers fully online, self-paced professional development courses for K-12 teachers. Complete a course and receive a Certificate of Completion — or add university graduate credits at checkout for an official transcript from one of our accredited university partners. HOW TO EARN PD CREDITS Our courses are accepted for CEUs, Salary Points, In-Service Points, Lane Credits, Clock Hours, and Graduate-Level University Credits depending on your state and district. Check the Credits Tab on any course page for details specific to your location. Not sure if your district will accept the credits? Download the course syllabus — you'll find the link on the course page below the Add to Cart button — and share it with your professional development department before purchasing. Join thousands of teachers who've advanced their careers with CE Credits Online. Read what teachers say → Choosing your enrollment type: Need a Certificate of Completion only? Choose Course Only in the Type dropdown. Need an official university transcript? Choose University Credits. See our University Partners page for details on our regionally accredited partners. For the full process visit our How to Earn PD Credits page. Questions? Check our FAQs or email support@cecreditsonline.org. children.headline: Collection: Online Professional Development Courses for K-12 Teachers
body: CE Credits Online offers fully online, self-paced professional development courses for K-12 teachers. Complete a course and receive a Certificate of Completion — or add university graduate credits at checkout for an official transcript from one of our accredited university partners.

Our courses are accepted for CEUs, Salary Points, In-Service Points, Lane Credits, Clock Hours, and Graduate-Level University Credits depending on your state and district. Check the Credits Tab on any course page for details specific to your location.

Not sure if your district will accept the credits? Download the course syllabus — you'll find the link on the course page below the Add to Cart button — and share it with your professional development department before purchasing.
Join thousands of teachers who've advanced their careers with CE Credits Online. Read what teachers say →
Choosing your enrollment type:
For the full process visit our How to Earn PD Credits page. Questions? Check our FAQs or email support@cecreditsonline.org.

items: Need a Certificate of Completion only? Choose Course Only in the Type dropdown.
Need an official university transcript? Choose University Credits. See our University Partners page for details on our regionally accredited partners.

landmarks.innerText: CE CREDITS ONLINE 23224 NE 156th Pl. Woodinville, WA 98077 Phone: 425.788.7275 support@cecreditsonline.org HAVE QUESTIONS? You can contact CE Credits Online by submitting a request from your Student Homepage under Customer Service which is in the upper right corner of your screen. You may also email us at support@cecreditsonline.org or call our customer service line at 425.788.7275 Ext. 104. Our office hours are Monday-Friday 8:00AM-5:00PM PST. We look forward to hearing from you! COURSES UNIVERSITY PARTNERS ABOUT FAQ'S BLOG WHAT TEACHERS SAY ABOUT US SUPPORT PRIVACY POLICY REFUND POLICY TERMS OF SERVICE DO NOT SELL MY DATA DATA REQUESTS COOKIE SETTINGS
